calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ravdeep S. Grewal, Esq. & Nitoj P. Singh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ministry of Velocity, LLC, a California company.
Eric Ritezel, Owner of Ministry of Velocity, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Lightwave LLC, a California company and Rana June, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 21, 2016.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 21, 2016.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ministry of Velocity, LLC, a California company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Lightwave LLC, a California company and Rana June, an individual, and enters Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,125.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,051.85.
Costs - $1,143.65, for a total Judgment in the amount of $46,320.50. (Joint & Serveral).

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
